title: ilex subtriflora
intro: Ilex subtriflora, also known as the Chinese holly, is a plant species that belongs to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) and is native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting immune function. Ilex subtriflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, or extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
